dsl_rule.translation_notes: N-day breakout strategy implemented using Donchian channels with N=5 days. Entry occurs when price breaks above the 5-day high (dc_upper) for long trades or below the 5-day low (dc_lower) for short trades. Exit occurs when the opposite breakout reverses the signal. The Donchian indicator directly captures the N-day high/low range referenced in the original signal.

backtest_rule.reason: N-day breakout strategy implemented using Donchian channels with N=5 days. Entry occurs when price breaks above the 5-day high (dc_upper) for long trades or below the 5-day low (dc_lower) for short trades. Exit occurs when the opposite breakout reverses the signal. The Donchian indicator directly captures the N-day high/low range referenced in the original signal.

source_rule_text: Enter a trade when price breaks above the N-day high or below the N-day low; exit when price reverses the N-day high or low in the opposite direction.
